ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the crew member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the crew member */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the crew member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the crew member (e.g., Waiter, Asst. Waiter) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the crew member (e.g., Dining, Engineering) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the crew member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the crew member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the crew member was hired */,
  "lifeboat_assigned" INTEGER /* ID of the lifeboat assigned to the crew member */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the crew member survived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_members_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the passenger */,
  "boarding_location" TEXT /* Location where the passenger boarded the ship */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Unique ticket number of the passenger */,
  "fare" TEXT /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number or location */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the ticket (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "lifeboat_assigned" INTEGER /* ID of the lifeboat assigned to the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the passenger survived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifeboats" (
  "lifeboat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the lifeboat */,
  "lifeboat_type" TEXT /* Type of lifeboat (e.g., Collapsible, Wooden) */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time the lifeboat was launched */,
  "rescue_ship" TEXT /* Ship that rescued the lifeboat */,
  "location_launched" TEXT /* Location from which the lifeboat was launched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifeboat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifeboat_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat assignment */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member assigned to the lifeboat */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger assigned to the lifeboat */,
  "lifeboat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifeboat to which the crew member or passenger is assigned */,
  "assignment_time" TEXT /* Time the assignment was made */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifeboat_assignments_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifeboat_assignments_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifeboat_assignments_lifeboat_id FOREIGN KEY ("lifeboat_id") REFERENCES lifeboats ("lifeboat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boarding_info" (
  "boarding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boarding record */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member who boarded */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who boarded */,
  "boarding_location" TEXT /* Location where the crew member or passenger boarded the ship */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time the crew member or passenger boarded the ship */,
  "boarding_status" TEXT /* Status of the boarding (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boarding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boarding_info_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boarding_info_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_data" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival record */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member who survived or did not survive */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who survived or did not survive */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the crew member or passenger survived */,
  "rescue_ship" TEXT /* Ship that rescued the crew member or passenger */,
  "rescue_time" TEXT /* Time of rescue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_data_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_data_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Waiter, Asst. Plateman) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the position (e.g., Dining, Engineering) */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Brief description of the responsibilities of the position */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age required for the position */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age required for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, visitor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
